channel.title: Database on Not a Peeker of Nature
channel.description: Recent content in Database on Not a Peeker of Nature

item.title: Tools in bioinformatics
item.description: #Dataset Multiomics (bulk cell): bulk ATAC-seq database https://academic.oup.com/nar/article/49/D1/D55/5943839 bulk ChIP-seq and ATAC-seq database https://chip-atlas.org/ Other ATAC-seq or ChIP-seq data can be downloaded from GEO (https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/) or Encode https://www.encodeproject.org/matrix/?type=Experiment&control_type!=*&status=released&perturbed=false roadmap (https://egg2.wustl.edu/roadmap) Multiomics (single cell): single cell database: https://data.humancellatlas.org/ human tumor: https://humantumoratlas.org/ Genome and annotations: UCSC for genome https://hgdownload.soe.ucsc.edu/downloads.html (eg. https://hgdownload.soe.ucsc.edu/goldenPath/dm3/) Ensembl for refgenes annotations https://ftp.ensembl.org/pub/ sybapse ypf2944164500@gmail.com @ypf19950216 Summary of online resources in genomics Appendix1: Kingfisher is a package for downloading fastq data
